Text.Page:
You look like someone with a taste for the finer things.

Want to turn a quick profit? I need a messenger.

Get this to {@LinkCreature:218#1008$$Nangor} as soon as possible!

What's {@LinkCreature:218#1028$$Bumon} want?

Oh, no! No, no, no. Mana filters from {@LinkCreature:18#10$$sentinel golems}? The money I owe him's not worth my hide!

If you get it instead, I'll pay you instead of him!

This is what we call a win-win situation. Bumon gets his due, you get paid, and I keep breathing!

Here's your share.
No, he wants mana filters from {@LinkCreature:18#10$$sentinel golems}—a load of them. You'll need to kill plenty.
